summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

sentiment.positive: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます
sentiment.negative: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます
sentiment.neutral: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます

raw_articles.title: At AI Summit, South Korea Outlines Its AI Future With NVIDIA and Partners
raw_articles.summary: At this week’s AI Summit in San Francisco, South Korean President Jae Myung Lee and some of the country’s top business leaders and researchers are meeting with NVIDIA and ecosystem partners to chart Korea’s AI progress. Building on NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang’s visit to Korea last month, this week’s discussions and announcements advance […]

raw_articles.title: U.S., other nations back open-source AI with 'strong security' at China summit
raw_articles.summary: The APEC statement is the first to include open-source cooperation at a minister level, said Li Lecheng, China's industry and information technology minister.

raw_articles.title: China's largest memory chipmaker sparks fears of a cash drain as it readies for public debut
raw_articles.summary: CXMT is stoking fears that its blockbuster stock market debut could pull cash from China's equities.

raw_articles.title: How AI guardrails are impeding the work of offensive cybersecurity researchers
raw_articles.summary: We spoke with several cybersecurity researchers, who look for unknown vulnerabilities and develop tools to exploit them, about how OpenAI’s and Anthropic’s guardrails affect their work.

raw_articles.title: Amazon cracks down on use of AI images by sellers after New York law
raw_articles.summary: A recently enacted New York law mandates that companies disclose when an ad includes a "synthetic performer" in place of a human actor.

raw_articles.title: Microsoft launches new in-house AI models it says cut costs up to 89% versus OpenAI
raw_articles.summary: Microsoft AI released two new in-house models into public preview on Wednesday — MAI-Image-2.5-Pro, its highest-fidelity image generator to date, and MAI-Voice-2-Flash, a speech model built for high-volume enterprise workloads — while publishing production data that amounts to the company's most aggressive argument yet that it can power its own products without leaning on OpenAI's frontier models.The announcement, made by Microsoft AI's Superintelligence team, lands roughly a year

raw_articles.title: Intel's stock jumps as chipmaker rides AI boom to fastest revenue growth in almost 15 years
raw_articles.summary: Intel rallied after the company reported blowout earnings and guidance.

raw_articles.title: Agentic coding goes hands-free as OpenAI brings GPT-Live's full duplex voice control to Codex and ChatGPT on the desktop
raw_articles.summary: Two weeks after debuting its more naturalistic GPT-Live audio AI model with full-duplex capabilities (listening and speaking at the same time), OpenAI is bringing it directly into developer workflows. The company announced that GPT-Live now powers the ChatGPT desktop application on macOS and Windows, integrating directly with agentic systems like Codex and ChatGPT Work (which are separate experiences available in the ChatGPT desktop app). raw_articles.title: OpenAI's Hugging Face hack triggers 'AI Kill Switch' bill in Congress
raw_articles.summary: OpenAI disclosed this week that some of its AI models went rogue and hacked into open-source developer platform Hugging Face.

raw_articles.title: What the OpenAI-Hugging Face Hack Means for Enterprises
raw_articles.summary: The incident is a lesson for enterprises that they need to implement appropriate cybersecurity guidance and keep their data within safe confines.

raw_articles.title: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system
raw_articles.summary: AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.

raw_articles.title: Schneider Electric, AMD Unveil Blueprint for AI Factory Deployments
raw_articles.summary: The companies’ design supports AI racks of up to 246kW.

raw_articles.title: Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models
raw_articles.summary: Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email.

raw_articles.title: Claude’s voice mode is now available for Opus and Sonnet
raw_articles.summary: Until now, voice mode has only been available on Claude Haiku, Anthropic's faster but less powerful model. Now the company is making its Opus and Sonnet models available in voice mode, and extending its reach into apps like Gmail, Slack, and Canva. When Anthropic launched voice mode last year, it was primarily focused on delivering […]

raw_articles.title: Meta’s New Feel-Good AI Ad Uses a Song About the World Ending
raw_articles.summary: The clip features the David Bowie track “Five Years,” which includes lyrics such as “Earth was really dying (dying).”
